page_content:
SOCY661 Social Stratiﬁcation (3 Credits) Major theoretical and research problems in the sociology of social stratiﬁcation. The characteristics, correlates, and consequences of class and status stratiﬁcation; the distribution of power; the relationship of social stratiﬁcation to ideology and the institutional orders of society. Restriction: Permission of instructor.

SOCY644 Gender, Work, and Family (3 Credits) The interrelationships among gender, work, and family in contemporary societies. Major research issues addressed from an interdisciplinary and comparative (international) perspective.

SOCY645 Sociology of the Self Concept (3 Credits) Theory and empirical research dealing with the social determination and social consequences of the self-concept. Sociological, psychological, and psychoanalytic approaches to the self.
